faqs.a: The tool renders both documents side by side so you can visually spot changes. Automated text-diff highlighting is coming soon.

faqs.q: Can I compare more than two files?
faqs.a: Currently the tool supports comparing two files at a time.

title: HTML to PDF Converter Online Free
meta: Convert web pages and HTML code to PDF documents for free. Fast and secure HTML to PDF conversion.
desc: Convert web pages or raw HTML code into downloadable PDF documents.
instructions: Paste the URL of a web page or enter raw HTML code.
Adjust the page size and margins if needed.
Click "Convert to PDF" to generate the document.
Download your new PDF.

benefits.title: Save web pages
benefits.desc: Archive any web page as a portable, offline PDF document.

benefits.title: Custom HTML support
benefits.desc: Paste your own HTML code and get a perfectly rendered PDF.

benefits.title: Adjustable layout
benefits.desc: Control page size, margins, and orientation.

faqs.q: Will the PDF look exactly like the web page?
faqs.a: The tool renders basic HTML and CSS. Complex JavaScript-driven layouts may not be perfectly reproduced.

faqs.q: Can I convert a live URL?
faqs.a: You can paste the URL and the tool will attempt to fetch and render the content.

title: PDF to PDF/A Converter | Archive Standard
meta: Convert PDF to PDF/A format for long-term archiving. Free online PDF/A converter.
desc: Convert your PDF documents to the ISO-standardized PDF/A format for long-term archiving.
instructions: Upload the PDF you want to convert to PDF/A.
Wait for the tool to embed fonts and comply with archival standards.
Click "Convert to PDF/A" to generate the archival document.
Download your new PDF/A file.

benefits.title: Long-term preservation
benefits.desc: PDF/A is the ISO standard for archiving documents electronically.

benefits.title: Regulatory compliance
benefits.desc: Many industries and governments require PDF/A for official records.

benefits.title: Self-contained
benefits.desc: All fonts and resources are embedded within the document.

faqs.q: What is PDF/A?
faqs.a: PDF/A is a specialized version of PDF designed specifically for long-term digital preservation and archiving of electronic documents.

faqs.q: Is PDF/A the same as regular PDF?
faqs.a: No. PDF/A has additional restrictions (like requiring all fonts to be embedded) to ensure documents remain readable for decades.

Select the position for page numbers (bottom-center, bottom-right, etc.).
Choose your numbering format and starting number.
Click "Add Page Numbers" and download the result.

benefits.title: Multiple positions
benefits.desc: Place page numbers at the top or bottom, left, center, or right.

benefits.title: Custom formatting
benefits.desc: Choose from various numbering formats like "Page 1 of X" or simple digits.

benefits.title: Selective application
benefits.desc: Apply to all pages, or skip the first page for title pages.

faqs.q: Can I skip the first page?

faqs.q: Can I customize the font and size?
faqs.a: The tool uses a clean, professional default font. Custom font selection is coming in a future update.

Download your black and white PDF.

benefits.title: Save printer ink
benefits.desc: Remove colors to print documents purely in B&W.

benefits.desc: Processing happens securely on your device.
